scale.description: Beatmap scale. At 2, every two beat positions will be merged, at 0.5 - a beat position added between every two existing ones. Note that sometimes you need to double or halve this value to get good results, when detected BPM is twice or half the actual BPM.

shift.description: Beatmap shift, in beats (applies before scaling):

variableBPM.description: Enable support for variable BPM, however this makes beat detection slightly less accurate

Beat-image.type: Dict(path: str | None (Path to a local file), url: str | None (Publicly available url or base64 enco

parameters.name: scale
parameters.label: Beatmap scale. At 2, every two beat positions will be merged, at 0.5 - a beat position added between every two existing ones. Note that sometimes you need to double or halve this value to get good results, when detected BPM is twice or half the actual BPM.

parameters.name: shift
parameters.label: Beatmap shift, in beats (applies before scaling):

parameters.name: variableBPM
